name: create_service
description: Create a new service on Render. Specify the service type (web_service, static_site, private_service, background_worker, cron_job), name, Git repository, build and start commands, environment runtime, region, plan, and auto-deploy settings. The service will immediately start building from the linked repository.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name for the service. Must be unique within your account. Used in the service URL.

parameters.name: branch
parameters.description: Git branch to deploy from. Default is the repository's default branch.

parameters.name: autoDeploy
parameters.description: Enable auto-deploy on push: 'yes' or 'no'. Default is 'yes'.

parameters.name: serviceDetails
parameters.description: Service-specific configuration including 'buildCommand', 'startCommand' (web/worker), 'publishPath' (static), 'env' (runtime: node, python, docker, go, rust, ruby, elixir), 'plan', 'region', 'numInstances', 'healthCheckPath'.

parameters.name: envVars
parameters.description: Array of environment variable objects with 'key' and 'value' properties.
